title: Lalmonirhat Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Lalmonirhat with a Z-Score of +3.37. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Lalmonirhat has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is causing discomfort to the residents with an humidity of 82% and wind speed of 11.4 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
